message:
Command `# CTS still crashing even with CTS_SINK_CLUSTERING_ENABLE=false!
# Check the CTS log to see if crash is at same location
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
echo "=== CTS log (new run) ==="
grep -n "CTS-\|Signal\|Clock\|clk\|Skipping\|SRAM\|Macro\|separateMacro" "$WRAPPER_RUN/61-openroad-cts/openroad-cts.log" 2>/dev/null | head -30

echo ""
echo "=== Last crash details ==="
grep "get1stSignal\|separateMacro\|Signal 11\|CTS-0049" "$WRAPPER_RUN/61-openroad-cts/openroad-cts.log" 2>/dev/null | head -10` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
# CTS still crashing even with CTS_SINK_CLUSTERING_ENABLE=false!
# Check the CTS log to see if crash is at same location
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
echo "=== CTS log (new run) ==="
grep -n "CTS-\|Signal\|Clock\|clk\|Skipping\|SRAM\|Macro\|separateMacro" "$WRAPPER_RUN/61-openroad-cts/openroad-cts.log" 2>/dev/null | head -30

echo ""

grep "get1stSignal\|separateMacro\|Signal 11\|CTS-0049" "$WRAPPER_RUN/61-openroad-cts/openroad-cts.log" 2>/dev/null | head -10
